title: Retreat - Farmhouse (HotSheets)
partnershipCategories: Wellness, Yoga Apparel, Sleep Tech, Nutraceuticals, EVs, Meditation Apps.
about: Retreat Farmhouse presents a wellness platform for brands to engage with the portfolio class seeking burnout prevention. More than a countryside escape, it offers strategic access to 20 digitally exhausted, high-net-worth individuals through EV drives, clean nutrition, and organic beauty rituals. Through curated intentional-slowness programming, brands can drive trial among those who treat wellness as productivity hack. The format supports athleisure, clean nutrition, EVs, and sustainable travel seeking luxury-wellness positioning. Partnering here positions brands as enabling the silence that restores the capacity to earn.

title: Rex Rooms Event
partnershipCategories: Haute Couture, Private Banking, Fine Art, Rare Spirits, Classic Cars
about: Rex Rooms presents an influence platform for brands to navigate London's most clandestine cultural salon. More than a private party, it offers strategic access to 100 stakeholders conducting due diligence on creative economy in real-time among couture, capital, and canvas. Through curated no-public-recaps environment, brands can drive relationships with those who influence the influencers. The format supports haute couture, private banking, fine art, and rare spirits seeking invisible-network penetration. Partnering here positions brands as credential itself—if you're here, you've arrived.

title: Chelsea Flower Show
partnershipCategories: Heritage Clothing, Banking, Skincare, Sparkling Wine.
about: Chelsea Flower Show presents a heritage platform for brands to anchor in 114 years of British horticultural prestige. More than a garden exhibition, it offers strategic entry into global soft power where home and garden, sparkling wine, and British fashion converge in world's most prestigious landscape moment. Through curated integrations in Royal Hospital Chelsea grounds, brands can drive visibility among legacy-wealth and aspiration-wealth simultaneously. The format supports luxury home, heritage tourism, and English sparkling wine seeking international credibility. Partnering here positions brands as part of Britain's ongoing narrative of cultivated beauty.

title: The Knox
partnershipCategories: AR/VR Tech, Interior Design, Spirits (Dark).
about: The Knox presents an exclusivity platform for brands to access Chelsea's most seductive, undocumented social scene. More than a basement bar, it offers strategic entry into 100-capacity intimate decadence where disco-ball elevators and '70s Miami cocktails create nostalgia-curated experience. Through curated integrations in no-listings, no-tags environment, brands can drive relevance among Sloane Square set playing at underground. The format supports champagne, prime real estate, and private concierge seeking old-money credibility. Partnering here positions brands as the secret worth keeping.

title: Medicine Festival
partnershipCategories: Eco-Housing, Outdoor Apparel, Functional Drinks, Ethical Banking, Charities.
about: Medicine Festival presents a purpose platform for brands to align with alcohol-free, phone-free, profit-for-purpose radicalism. More than a wellness event, it offers strategic entry into five-day temporary community where functional beverages, outdoor gear, and mental health apps serve genuine transformation narrative. Through curated integrations in Berkshire's open-air setting, brands can drive engagement with conscious consumers committed to ecosystem repair. The format supports ethical fashion, plant medicine, and functional wellness seeking authenticity-proof credibility. Partnering here positions brands as part of the solution, not the consumption.

title: No Art Festival
partnershipCategories: Housing & Co-Living, Vintage Fashion, Music Streaming, Audio Tech, Rideshare, Publishing.
about: No Arts Festival Mumbai presents an uncompromising platform for brands to align with underground electronic music's purest ethos. More than a large-scale event, it offers strategic entry into Amsterdam-born warehouse culture translated to 15,000-capacity Indian scale. Through curated integrations in strictly no-compromise environment, brands can drive relevance with genre-literate, anti-EDM audiences who research before they rave. The format supports global spirits, underground fashion, and independent publishing seeking authentic subcultural credibility. Partnering here positions brands as understanding that "No" is actually an invitation.

title: HotSheets
partnershipCategories: Beauty & Skincare (Sheet Masks/Glow), Sleepwear & Lingerie, RTD Cocktails/Seltzers, FemTech & Period Care, Luxury Chocolate/Snacking, Hair Tools.
about: India's first luxury slumber party retreat. A 20-hour "hotel takeover" dedicated to beauty, bonding, and the "soft life" aesthetic. This is a hyper-targeted environment for brands to engage with women in their most relaxed, unguarded state—pajamas on, guards down. Perfect for beauty, sleepwear, and wellness brands seeking deep emotional connection and "girl gang" virality.

title: Cercle
partnershipCategories: Luxury Travel Cards, Premium Spirits, Audio Hardware, Luxury Fashion, Smartphones, Automotive, Hospitality
about: Cercle in Mumbai presents a cinematic platform for brands to align with one of the world’s most visually iconic electronic music movements. Known for staging performances in extraordinary locations and broadcasting them globally, Cercle blends music, heritage, and visual storytelling into a singular cultural moment. Through immersive staging and globally distributed content, partner brands gain access to a highly international, culturally literate audience that values aesthetics as much as sound. The format supports premium lifestyle, travel, and technology brands seeking high-credibility cultural placement. Partnering here positions brands inside a globally documented music experience rather than a traditional concert.

title: Circus
partnershipCategories: Global Spirits, Streetwear, Sneakers, Energy Drinks, Gaming, Neo-Banking, Ride-Hailing, Audio Streaming
about: Circus presents a large-format electronic music festival platform bringing together global house and techno headliners with India’s most progressive dance audience. More than a festival lineup, it creates an immersive production environment where stage design, lighting, and sound scale elevate the experience into a destination event. Through curated brand integrations across stages, lounges, and digital amplification, partners gain access to high-spend electronic music consumers who travel for lineups and document every moment. The format supports lifestyle, beverage, and youth culture brands seeking deep nightlife relevance. Partnering here positions brands within one of India’s fastest-growing electronic music festival circuits.

title: QueerMade - Tinder
partnershipCategories: Dating Apps, Beauty & Grooming, Fashion & Streetwear, Beverage Brands, LGBTQ+ Advocacy Organizations, Ride-Hailing, Payment Wallets, Lifestyle Retai
about: QueerMade by Tinder presents a community-first cultural platform celebrating identity, creativity, and connection within India’s LGBTQ+ ecosystem. More than a festival, it is a safe-space environment where music, art, conversation, and self-expression converge into a high-engagement social experience. Through curated performances, creator programming, and community-led storytelling, partner brands can demonstrate authentic support while building trust with a digitally connected, culturally influential audience. The format supports lifestyle, beauty, and fintech brands seeking meaningful community engagement and inclusive brand positioning. Partnering here positions brands as active allies in one of India’s most progressive cultural movements

title: Anyma
partnershipCategories: Smartphones, Gaming Hardware, Audio Technology, Luxury Fashion, Automotive, Visual Technology, Premium Spirits, Wearable Tech
about: Anyma presents a next-generation electronic music platform where immersive visuals, AI-driven storytelling, and melodic techno converge into a cinematic performance experience. More than a concert, it is a sensory spectacle where music, technology, and digital art operate as a single narrative system. Through large-scale visual production and globally shared content moments, partner brands gain access to a highly engaged, tech-forward audience drawn to innovation and futurism. The format supports technology, automotive, and lifestyle brands seeking association with cutting-edge cultural experiences. Partnering here positions brands at the intersection of music, technology, and digital culture.

title: Awakenings
partnershipCategories: Global Spirits, Streetwear, Audio Streaming, Travel Cards, Sneakers, Energy Drinks, Telecommunications, Premium Apparel
about: Awakenings presents a world-class techno festival platform recognized globally for its scale, production quality, and genre authority. Through multi-stage programming and large-format experiential builds, partner brands gain sustained visibility among high-frequency nightlife consumers and globally connected music audiences. The format supports beverage, fashion, and fintech brands seeking strong festival presence and repeat engagement. Partnering here positions brands inside one of the most respected names in global techno culture

title: Rolling Loud
partnershipCategories: Sneakers, Streetwear, Smartphones, Quick Commerce, Energy Drinks, Gaming, Telecom, QSR, Financial Services
about: Rolling Loud presents a mass-culture platform for brands to access one of the world’s most influential youth music audiences. Through multi-day programming, merchandise drops, and creator-driven amplification, partner brands can drive national visibility and strong digital engagement among Gen-Z and young millennial consumers. The format supports consumer tech, streetwear, and beverage brands seeking high-volume reach and cultural relevance. Partnering here positions brands inside a globally recognized youth culture ecosystem.

title: Time & Tequila
partnershipCategories: Wealth Management, Apparel, Aviation, Golf Clubs, High-End Audio.
about: Time & Tequila Delhi presents a power platform for brands to access Lutyens' established, inheritance-based elite. More than a spirits event, it offers strategic entry into Delhi's ceremony-appreciating, ritual-oriented wealth through private, conversation-driven gatherings. Through curated agave education and unhurried luxury, brands can drive status-signaling adoption among those who've seen funded noise and prefer old-money quiet. The format supports super-premium tequila, cigars, and luxury tourism seeking genuine high-net-worth penetration. Partnering here positions brands as shared language among those who don't need to prove anything.
remark: May to June or October to December

title: Time & Tequila
partnershipCategories: Wealth Management, Apparel, Aviation, Golf Clubs, High-End Audio.

remark: May to June or October to December

title: UC47
partnershipCategories: Crypto & Web3, Sneaker Apparel, Auto Clubs, Gaming & Esports, Energy Drinks, Grooming.
about: UC47 presents a movement platform for brands to engage with Mumbai's experience-collecting, drop-chasing generation. More than an underground event, it offers strategic entry through three-tier membership—Ignition, Turbo, Nitro—where supercar showcases, sneaker auctions, and no-rules music create password-protected culture. Through curated tiered integrations and Warehouse47 ecosystem access, brands can drive adoption among those who trade in limited releases and unforgettable nights. The format supports performance vehicles, streetwear, energy drinks, and membership platforms seeking subcultural ownership. Partnering here positions brands as the key to the basement everyone wants to access.

title: House 47 - Immersive Dining
partnershipCategories: Dining Credit Cards, Smart Kitchen Tech, Homeware, AR/VR, Interior Design.
about: House 47 presents a spectacle platform for brands to access Mumbai's most FOMO-generating dining experience. More than a restaurant, it offers strategic entry into 40-seat, 90-minute, ₹20,000 cinematic performance where projection mapping and dry-ice theatrics transform cuisine into flex. Through curated immersive technology and surprise architecture, brands can drive visibility among crypto-affluent, culturally omnivorous audiences who pay for documentation-worthy moments. The format supports luxury spirits, tech/AV innovation, and experiential design seeking waitlist-creating credibility. Partnering here positions brands as the password and the patience required to access tomorrow's dinner conversation.

title: Third Space Sanctuary
partnershipCategories: Men’s Grooming, Premium Mixers, Leather Goods, Watches, Neo-Banking, Ride-Hailing.
about: An immersive dining sanctuary designed for genuine connection. We provide a high-engagement, conversation-first alternative to the club scene, specifically engineered for community building. By blending atmosphere with organic content creation, we offer partners a captive audience where the "night out" narrative serves as a powerful engine for brand advocacy. This format allows brands to bypass the noise and build lasting consumer loyalty through meaningful, uninterrupted interaction.

title: Jaipur Polo
partnershipCategories: Luxury Brands, Cars, Watches, Apparels , Horse Related Brands
about: Jaipur Polo presents a legacy platform for brands to claim territory inside India's oldest living sport culture. More than a match, it offers strategic entry into a 200-year-old arena where mallets, maharaja bloodlines, and manicured lawns define the original drop — one that money alone cannot manufacture. Through curated field-side integrations and the Polo Ground ecosystem, brands can anchor themselves among old-money inheritors, new-wealth aspirants, and the diplomatically connected who measure status not in followers but in chukkers played and invitations received.The format supports heritage horology, single malt spirits, bespoke automotive, luxury leather, and private banking seeking the one thing no campaign can buy — the quiet credibility of having always been there. Partnering here positions brands not as a sponsor on a banner, but as a crest on the collar — the kind of association that travels from the stands to the club dining room to the family office without ever raising its voice.

title: Udaipur Polo
partnershipCategories: Luxury Brands, Cars, Watches, Apparels , Horse Related Brands
about: Chunda Polo, Udaipur presents a sovereign platform for brands to embed themselves inside Rajputana's most atmospheric sporting ritual. More than a tournament, it offers strategic entry into a setting where a 15th-century palace watches over the field, heritage bloodstock runs the turf, and the audience arrives by lineage, relationship, and knowing the right name at the right gate.Through field-side integrations and Chunda's captive hospitality ecosystem — suites, dining, and the quiet corridors between — brands can position themselves among India's old-guard elite and the culturally discerning traveller who books destinations the way others book tables: months in advance, without asking the price.The format supports heritage jewellery, aged spirits, private aviation, and resort-luxury seeking the one currency no media buy can generate — the sense of having been woven in, not bolted on. Partnering here positions brands not as a logo on the lawn, but as part of the ceremony itself.

title: Farm Is Table
partnershipCategories: Luxury Brands, Heritage Travellers , Media and Magazines, Chef led brands, Alcohol , Cars, Community Led Brands,
about: Farm Is Table elevates Mewari cuisine through authentic wartime meals, post-war recovery dishes, seasonal harvests, and ancient recipes sourced directly from Udaipur's organic farms. Guests experience hyper-local ingredients—millets, heirloom grains, native greens—prepared using traditional techniques like matka clay pot cooking, wood-fired tandoor, and dum pukht slow-cooking. Each 8-course tasting menu narrates Rajasthan's resilient culinary history, from warrior sustenance to celebratory recovery feasts, served in historic haveli settings with cultural storytelling and folk music.This premium experience targets discerning travelers seeking cultural depth, priced at ₹25,000-50,000 per guest for private events and ₹15,000-25,000 for groups. Its unique proposition: authentic multi-generational Mewari recipes tied to wartime/post-war heritage and farm partnerships, forging profound connections to Udaipur's gastronomic legacy
